name: Player Elevator
description: Build a vertical player elevator using water and pistons. The elevator should move players between 3 floors (ground, middle, top). Use water columns for smooth movement and pistons to control water flow. Include buttons at each floor for selection.
hints: Water flows down and can be pushed by pistons
Source blocks can be moved by pistons
Use observers to detect button presses
Water elevator needs soul sand or lily pads for upward movement
Control water flow with pistons pushing source blocks sideways

verification.initial_state: Elevator at ground floor, water column ready
verification.action: Press button for middle or top floor
verification.expected_result: Water column should activate and player can swim to selected floor
